seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well."
new_constraint: Start the email with an apology or an expression of regret.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well." Start the email with an apology or an expression of regret.
response:
Subject: Request for Product Demo - [Your Company Name]

Dear [Developer Name],

I hope this message finds you well.

Please accept my apologies for reaching out out of the blue, as I know how busy your schedule must be. I have been following the development of [Product Name] and am very impressed with the technical architecture and the solutions you are providing in the [Industry/Niche] space.

I am interested in learning more about how your software could integrate with our current workflow. Would you be available for a brief product demo sometime next week? I am particularly interested in seeing [specific feature, e.g., the API documentation / the dashboard / the automation tools].

Please let me know if you have a preferred time or a booking link, and I will do my best to accommodate your schedule.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
[Your Company]<turn|>

evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The Model Response adheres to the constraints provided in the Instruction. It begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well" and includes an apology ("Please accept my apologies for reaching out out of the blue"). There are no conflicting constraints in the Instruction, so the model did not need to identify or resolve any conflicts. **Answer**: 1
